r1.name: Coorg Resort 1
r1.description: This premium resort in Coorg offers spacious accommodation, scenic views, modern amenities, recreational facilities, fine dining, and a relaxing atmosphere for families, couples, and corporate travelers. Guests can enjoy curated experiences, local attractions, wellness activities, and exceptional hospitality throughout their stay.
